title: astracantha longiramosa
intro: Astracantha longiramosa, also known as the long-ramose astracantha or Astragalus longiramosus, is a plant species belonging to the legume family, Fabaceae. It is a perennial herb native to the mountainous regions of Turkey, used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant is valued for its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its health benefits in treating conditions such as colds, fever, and respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, Astracantha longiramosa is often dried and used as a tea or tincture to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
